core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Change behavior to silently add a port to the reserved list if reservation fails, instead of throwing a RuntimeException.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Commented out 'throw new RuntimeException(...)' and added 'reserved.add(Integer.parseInt(property)); return;'

core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Correct a bug where the loop iterated over the original class instead of the current class in the hierarchy traversal.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Changed 'clazz.getDeclaredFields()' to 'current.getDeclaredFields()' inside the do-while loop.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger to the configuration class for runtime diagnostics.
Replace manual RestTemplate usage with a generated OpenAPI client (PetApi) to simplify HTTP interaction.
Remove boilerplate code for constructing RequestEntity and handling ResponseEntity manually.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed RequestEntity.post(...), restTemplate.exchange(...), and status code checks.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Change method signature to throw the specific ApiException from the generated client instead of generic Exception.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: public Pet addPet(String name) throws ApiException

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Remove the @Value injection for the URL since the generated client handles configuration.
Update imports to use the generated client classes and remove unused Spring Web client imports.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with modern Spring Framework standards.
Explicitly define the mock endpoint path to ensure correct routing in the test context.
Use static import for ArgumentMatchers.any to simplify mock setup code.
Correct the assertion in the failure test case to properly handle the expected exception instead of asserting null.
Add new test cases to verify successful pet creation scenarios with proper response validation.
Specify the base path for the mocked endpoint to match the updated API configuration.

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Implement AutoCloseable interface to ensure the embedded server is destroyed when the extension lifecycle ends.
junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.human_impl: implements AutoCloseable { @Override public void close() { server.destroy(); } }

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Add a static flag to track if the extension has been initialized to manage global state.
Register the extension instance in the global JUnit 5 store to allow access across test contexts.

junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
